about.heading: About me
about.description: A blend of engineering rigor and marketing intuition. I build AI-native products, write code that matters, and help businesses find their voice in the digital space.

bio.paragraph1: I'm Alexandros Tsardoulias, an AI-Native Software Engineer and Marketing Specialist. I combine technical expertise with strategic thinking to create solutions that work in the real world.
bio.paragraph2: My philosophy is simple: less is more. I prefer clean, functional code and measured design over bloated solutions. I believe technology should serve people — not the other way around.
bio.paragraph3: I'm currently focused on how artificial intelligence is changing the way we work, communicate, and create. I write code, analyze data, and build products with meaning.

items.title: Less is More
items.description: I prefer clean, functional code and measured design. Complexity is a liability — simplicity scales.

items.title: Technology Serves People
items.description: Every line of code I write has a human at the other end. Technology is a tool, not an end in itself.

items.title: Continuous Learning
items.description: The field evolves daily. I stay curious, experiment often, and never assume I've figured it all out.

work.heading: What I do
work.description: From full-stack web apps to go-to-market strategy — I deliver end-to-end solutions. Every project starts with understanding your goals and ends with measurable results.
